What We Do

Complete heating & hot water services

From new boiler installations to servicing, repairs and full renewable systems — one trusted team for every job, big or small.

Gas

Gas boiler installs, repairs and safety checks carried out by experienced engineers — safe, efficient and fully compliant.

Oil

Oil-fired boiler installation, servicing and repair for off-grid and rural homes — keeping properties warm all year round.

LPG

Specialists in LPG heating — installation, conversion and maintenance for homes and properties without mains gas.

Plumbing

General plumbing alongside your heating — from leaks and pipework to taps, valves, ball-valves and full system upgrades.

Heating

Complete central heating systems, radiator upgrades, power-flushing and smart controls for better comfort and lower bills.

Servicing

Annual servicing and planned maintenance to keep your system safe, efficient and warranty-compliant year-round.

Installations

Energy-efficient boiler and system installations with manufacturer-approved guarantees of up to 10–12 years.

Unvented Cylinders

Unvented hot water cylinder installation and servicing for strong, mains-pressure hot water throughout the home.

Renewables

Greener heating solutions including air-source heat pumps and low-carbon system upgrades — building a warmer, greener future.

Repairs & Breakdowns

Fast, reliable fault-finding and repairs to get your heating and hot water back up and running with minimal disruption.

Landlord Certificates

Gas safety checks and landlord certificates carried out promptly, keeping your rental properties safe and compliant.

Qualified & Insured

On Time, Every Time

About Us

Meet Mat — your local heating engineer.

Trusted Gas, Oil & LPG engineer based in Chesterfield, covering Derbyshire and Sheffield.

Boiler installs, servicing and repairs done properly — with the kind of workmanship you can actually see in the pipework. Free, no-obligation quotes on every job.

Whether it's a quick fix, an annual service or a full system swap, you'll deal with Mat directly. No call-centres, no middlemen — just an honest local engineer who turns up when he says he will.

Mat
